description: Per-failure-class remediation templates for escalations and replan waves.

templates.title: Command execution failure
templates.retryGuidance: Re-run the failing command in an isolated worktree with verbose logging and a clean environment.
replanSuggestions: Split setup and verify commands into separate shell steps
Pin toolchain versions in task commands
Add preflight checks for required binaries and env vars
operatorChecklist: Capture stdout/stderr from the failed attempt
Verify cwd, PATH, and secret-backed env vars
Confirm container runtime health before rerun
regressionChecks: Add a shell guard that fails fast on non-zero exit codes
Record command duration and exit code in task logs

templates.title: Acceptance check failure
templates.retryGuidance: Re-run acceptance checks only after confirming required artifacts exist and paths are stable.
replanSuggestions: Tighten acceptance checks to assert artifact paths explicitly
Add intermediate artifact-producing commands before checks
Lower task parallelism for flaky artifact races
operatorChecklist: Inspect generated artifacts against acceptance criteria
Validate file permissions and mount paths in the workspace
Compare acceptance command output with prior passing run
regressionChecks: Add acceptance checks that validate artifact checksums
Gate retries on artifact presence probes

templates.title: Dependency-blocked task
templates.retryGuidance: Resolve upstream task failures before retrying blocked dependents.
replanSuggestions: Reorder tasks to reduce brittle dependency chains
Add explicit dependency health probes
Split blocking prerequisites into smaller tasks
operatorChecklist: List unresolved upstream task IDs from execution results
Confirm dependency graph matches plan spec
Re-run only the upstream closure before dependents
regressionChecks: Add dependency preflight logging in task executor
Emit blockedBy details in escalation artifacts

templates.title: Unresolved HITL escalation
templates.retryGuidance: Pause automated retries until required operator or planner escalations are resolved or waived.
replanSuggestions: Convert operator-only blockers into planner-adjustable task specs
Add waiver metadata with expiry for known-safe exceptions
operatorChecklist: Review SUPERVISOR_ACTIONS.json and ESCALATION_STATE.md
Resolve or waive high-priority operator escalations
Confirm run status is no longer blocked before resume
regressionChecks: Track escalation aging in ops status
Alert when unresolved operator/high count is non-zero

templates.title: Replan loop stalled
templates.retryGuidance: Do not rerun identical planner signatures; change task commands or escalation keys before the next wave.
replanSuggestions: Increase maxAttempts only for tasks with new command signatures
Escalate unchanged planner keys to operator review
Reduce replan wave scope to the minimal failing closure
operatorChecklist: Compare replan_wave summaries for unchanged plannerSignature
Inspect stallReason on the latest wave artifact
Validate planner actions changed between waves
regressionChecks: Fail replan when planner signature is unchanged across waves

templates.title: Verification readiness failure
templates.retryGuidance: Re-run verification after execution and escalation gates report healthy status.
replanSuggestions: Add verification preflight tasks for missing artifacts
Split verification into staged gates with clearer failure signals
operatorChecklist: Review run_summary verificationPassed and productionReady flags
Confirm required run artifacts exist under runs/<id>/
Check FAILURE_TAXONOMY.md for dominant classes
regressionChecks: Block promotion when verificationPassed is false
Map readiness failures into taxonomy before go/no-go

templates.title: Soak cycle failure
templates.retryGuidance: Re-run soak with enforce-gate disabled only for diagnosis; fix root step before enforcing gates again.
replanSuggestions: Quarantine flaky unit tests identified in FLAKY_CANDIDATES.json
Stabilize soak step ordering and timeouts
operatorChecklist: Inspect SOAK_STATUS.json failed step and exit code
Review SOAK_TRENDS.json for repeat failures
Confirm flaky quarantine policy effective exit code
regressionChecks: Track soak failure class share week over week
Alert on repeat failure class across 3+ cycles

templates.title: Unmapped failure
templates.retryGuidance: Capture raw failure signals and extend FAILURE_TAXONOMY_POLICY mapping before retrying.
replanSuggestions: Add explicit mapping rule for the observed signal
Route unmapped failures to operator review
operatorChecklist: Collect raw logs and signal text from the failing subsystem
File a taxonomy mapping update if signal is new
regressionChecks: Keep unmappedCount at zero in FAILURE_TAXONOMY.json
Review unknown class share during reliability KPI review
